mission.chinese: 输出审美，严选供应商，创造客户价值
mission.english: Output aesthetics, strictly select suppliers, create customer value

vision.chinese: 打造全国最大的女性时尚线上市场
vision.english: Build the largest online fashion marketplace for female consumers
vision.notes: Aligned with 2024 strategic growth objectives and digital transformation roadmap

tier_1_mindset.description: The foundational mindset that guides all interactions and decisions within the organization.

tier_2_execution_standards.chinese: 一听就懂、一看就会、边抄边改、用户导向
tier_2_execution_standards.english: Easy to understand, Easy to follow, Copy-and-adapt, User-oriented
tier_2_execution_standards.description: Practical standards that ensure operational excellence and user-centric execution.

tier_3_self_transcendence.description: The aspirational value that drives continuous learning and personal growth.

revision_history.changes: Updated vision statement to reflect digital marketplace strategy; refined mindset tier terminology
